vocabulary.example: We confirmed combination wave generator measurement before releasing the measurement result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 我們在發布量測結果前確認了組合波產生器量測。

vocabulary.example: The laboratory evaluates open-circuit voltage measurement under documented environmental conditions.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 實驗室在有紀錄的環境條件下評估開路電壓量測。

vocabulary.example: The report links short-circuit current measurement to the applicable requirement and result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 報告將短路電流量測連結到適用要求與結果。

vocabulary.example: The engineer compared coupling decoupling network measurement with the approved baseline.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師將耦合去耦網路量測與核准基準進行比較。

vocabulary.example: The final review found that line-to-line coupling measurement was consistently documented.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 最終審查確認線對線耦合量測已有一致的文件紀錄。

vocabulary.example: The technical record includes objective evidence for line-to-ground coupling measurement.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術紀錄包含線對地耦合量測的客觀證據。

vocabulary.example: The customer requested a clear explanation of surge impulse measurement.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 客戶要求清楚說明突波脈衝量測。

vocabulary.example: The procedure defines the acceptance criterion for phase angle synchronization measurement.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 程序定義了相位角同步量測的接受準則。

vocabulary.example: The test plan identifies how generator verification measurement will be controlled and recorded.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試計畫說明如何控制並記錄產生器確認量測。

vocabulary.example: The project team discussed residual voltage measurement during the pre-test meeting.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 專案團隊在測試前會議中討論了殘餘電壓量測。

common_sentences.english: Could you record open-circuit voltage measurement in the test log?
common_sentences.zh_tw: 可以請你把開路電壓量測記錄在測試日誌嗎？

common_sentences.english: The latest result indicates a change in short-circuit current measurement.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 最新結果顯示短路電流量測有所變化。

common_sentences.english: Please keep coupling decoupling network measurement unchanged during the comparison.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 進行比較時，請保持耦合去耦網路量測不變。

common_sentences.english: The team will repeat line-to-line coupling measurement under the worst-case condition.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 團隊會在最嚴苛條件下重新執行線對線耦合量測。

common_sentences.english: The report clearly identifies the method used for line-to-ground coupling measurement.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 報告已清楚標示線對地耦合量測所使用的方法。

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified combination wave generator measurement and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認組合波產生器量測並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for open-circuit voltage measurement?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對開路電壓量測的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: ESD fail — Surge investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 靜電放電測試失敗：雷擊突波調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 051 shows a repeatable esd fail condition.
debug_case.background: The Surge configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: The discharge current reaches a sensitive reset line.
Chassis bonding impedance is too high.
check_steps: Reproduce the failing point and polarity.
Monitor reset, power, and clock lines during discharge.
corrective_actions: Improve transient protection and firmware recovery.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the Surge design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Please introduce yourself as an RF compliance engineer. Connect your answer to Surge.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 請用專業經歷、核心能力與成果組成 60 秒自我介紹。 並連結到「雷擊突波」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I am an RF compliance engineer with hands-on experience in measurement, debugging, and certification. I communicate test evidence clearly and work across design, laboratory, and customer teams. In Surge, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「combination wave generator measurement」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: combination wave generator measurement 指的是「組合波產生器量測」。

quiz.prompt: 「開路電壓量測」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 open-circuit voltage measurement。

quiz.prompt: The report links ________ to the applicable requirement and result.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 報告將短路電流量測連結到適用要求與結果。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 short-circuit current measurement。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 coupling decoupling network measurement（耦合去耦網路量測）。

quiz.prompt: Please introduce yourself as an RF compliance engineer. Connect your answer to Surge.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 請用專業經歷、核心能力與成果組成 60 秒自我介紹。 並連結到「雷擊突波」。
quiz.answer: I am an RF compliance engineer with hands-on experience in measurement, debugging, and certification. I communicate test evidence clearly and work across design, laboratory, and customer teams. In Surge, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
